continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: The name and nature of the Yuuzhan Vong becomes known gradually rather than instantly across the galaxy.
content.injection: In Early Yuuzhan Vong invasion, early scenes should distinguish rumors, intelligence briefings, and public knowledge about the Vong. Do not import later-era status, relationships, factions, or outcomes into this window.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Early Yuuzhan Vong invasion.
Respect story-position bounds from Vector Prime / Invasion Begins to Ithor Devastated.
antiLore: Do not let general model memory override the selected Legends story position.
content.notes: Generated development Lorecard pending human review.

content.fact: Yuuzhan Vong gods, sacrifices, and caste logic are not fully understood by outsiders at first contact.
content.injection: When active in Early Yuuzhan Vong invasion, early NJO outsiders should misread or incompletely understand Vong religious motives. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Early Yuuzhan Vong invasion.
Respect story-position bounds from Vector Prime / Invasion Begins to Ithor Devastated.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

content.fact: Nom Anor often operates through disguises, cutouts, and false political identities.
content.injection: Do not make Nom Anor’s true role obvious to casual characters unless context has exposed him.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.

content.fact: Onimi’s true significance is endgame knowledge, not public wartime understanding.
content.injection: In The Unifying Force endgame, until The Unifying Force endgame, keep Onimi’s true significance hidden or misread; do not let ordinary wartime characters speak as if they already understand his real role.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: The Unifying Force endgame.
